cards.name: Signet
cards.rewards: 3-2-1 structure: 3x rewards on Electronics & Apparel, 2x on Entertainment, 1x on other categories
cards.lounge: Complimentary domestic lounge access – spend INR 20,000+ in a quarter to get 1 domestic lounge visit the next quarter
cards.welcome_benefit: Amazon Pay e-Voucher worth ₹200 on minimum spend of ₹3,000 in first 30 days
cards.badge: Lifetime free card for young spenders

cards.name: Imperio
cards.rewards: 3-2-1 structure: 3x rewards on Health Care & Grocery, 2x on Utility (bill payments), 1x on other categories
cards.lounge: Complimentary domestic lounge access – spend ₹40,000+ in a quarter to get 2 domestic lounge visits the next quarter
cards.welcome_benefit: Amazon Pay e-Voucher worth ₹400 on minimum spend of ₹5,000 in first 30 days

cards.name: Celesta
cards.rewards: 3-2-1 structure: 3x rewards on Travel & International, 2x on Dining, 1x on other categories
cards.lounge: Complimentary international lounge access (2 visits annually, no spend requirement); domestic lounge access requires ₹60,000+ quarterly spend for 2 visits the next quarter
cards.welcome_benefit: Amazon Pay e-Voucher worth ₹600 on minimum spend of ₹10,000 in first 30 days
cards.badge: Premium travel & lifestyle card with 1% fuel surcharge waiver

cards.name: Wave Card
cards.rewards: 10% cashback on first 5 UPI transactions in first 30 days (capped at ₹200); 1 reward point per ₹200 spent; 1000 bonus reward points on ₹50,000 quarterly spend
cards.welcome_benefit: 10% cashback on first 5 UPI transactions within first 30 days (capped at ₹200)
cards.badge: RuPay UPI floater card linked to primary card
